sidebar_create_button.note: Top-left sidebar + Create button - try first

create_button.note: Position in Custom size panel, right of Width/Height/Units row

uploads_sidebar_button.note: Left sidebar Uploads icon (cloud with upward arrow) - Step 3

upload_files_button.note: Upload files button (purple button in Uploads panel) - Step 4

uploaded_image_click.note: Click on newly uploaded image to place it on canvas - Step 6

instructions: Simple workflow: Upload one image at a time, place it, add blank page, repeat.
